_meta.description: 玩家與彈珠場基礎數值（HP、球數、起始球、球超時、發射力與物理參數）。Q-007 已定案：此檔為專案標準資料檔，程式不得寫死這些值。

deprecated_fields.launch_speed: deprecated by Q-033 / Codex 18. Retained for schema compatibility; plunger launch uses player.plunger_launch_speed.
deprecated_fields.launch_speed_min: deprecated by Q-031 and superseded by Q-033. Retained for schema compatibility; card 18 does not use player charge.
deprecated_fields.launch_speed_max: deprecated by Q-031 and superseded by Q-033. Retained for schema compatibility; card 18 does not use player charge.
deprecated_fields.charge_cycle_seconds: deprecated by Q-031 and superseded by Q-033. Player-controlled charge timing is card 19 scope.
